title: Re Made: Create For Cool Create
description: Modpack that implements the mod create with many other cool mods.
body:
# **Re Made: Create For Cool Create**
This is a modpack based around the mod Create. It dilivers a new minecraft to you and relly why you wanna play this is for the most ultimate exprerince in modded Minecraft.

This is a modpack inspierd of the modpack Cool Create but for better exprerince and quality. You can use this in you own world but be sure to not have any client side mods installed on the server.

This modpack has many mods like 3d skin layers and guns. But be carful to not start a war :). For the feeling we use a custom world generation. Hope you are happy with this awesome modpack!
